title: Manager in Financial Crime Solutions Team

summary.lv: Finanšu noziegumu risinājumu (FinCrime) vadītāja amats EY Baltic, izstrādājot un kalibrējot transakciju monitoringa, sankciju skrīninga un klientu riska modeļus bankām ar praktisku datu analīzi SQL, Python un R.
summary.en: A Manager role in EY Baltic's Financial Crime Solutions team designing and calibrating transaction-monitoring, sanctions-screening and customer-risk models for banks, with hands-on data analysis in SQL, Python and R.
